cards.title: Hotels
cards.body: Direct booking, packages, rates, inventory, Booking Engine setup, social demand, Traveliko, and Partner channels.

cards.title: Partners
cards.body: Bookable recommendations, WinkLinks storefronts, Social Share assets, campaign attribution, and commercial terms.

cards.title: Platforms
cards.body: Search, booking, payment, webhook, SDK, and embedded hotel-commerce paths.

items.question: Who should request a demo?
items.answer: Hotels, Partners, platforms, agencies, and developers should request a demo when they want to understand how Wink connects hotel supply to bookable demand.

items.question: Is the demo different for each role?
items.answer: Yes. Hotel demos should focus on supply, Booking Engine paths, and channel control. Partner demos should focus on bookable assets and attribution. Developer demos should focus on API and integration paths.

items.question: Can I request a demo before signing up?
items.answer: Yes. Demo is the right path when the use case needs discussion before account setup.

fields.heading: Ready to make hotel demand bookable?
fields.body: Start with the route that matches your team, then move into a focused demo or sign-up flow.
